ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the match was played */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "side_blue" TEXT /* Team name for the blue side */,
  "side_red" TEXT /* Team name for the red side */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winning side (blue or red) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "patch_version" TEXT /* Patch version of the game when the match was played */,
  "spectators" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who watched the match */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Type of game mode (e.g., Classic, ARAM) */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Ranked, Normal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the player is active */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., solo, carry, support, jungle) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Current rank of the player (e.g., Bronze, Gold, Diamond) */,
  "main_champion" TEXT /* Primary champion the player prefers */,
  "secondary_champion" TEXT /* Secondary champion the player prefers */,
  "total_games" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., armor, damage, utility) */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the item in gold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  "build_from" TEXT /* List of items that can be built into this item */,
  "build_into" TEXT /* List of items that can be built from this item */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the item (e.g., 'Boots', 'Armor', 'Damage') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item purchase */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match participant */,
  "item1" TEXT /* First item purchased by the player */,
  "item2" TEXT /* Second item purchased by the player */,
  "item3" TEXT /* Third item purchased by the player */,
  "item4" TEXT /* Fourth item purchased by the player */,
  "item5" TEXT /* Fifth item purchased by the player */,
  "item6" TEXT /* Sixth item purchased by the player */,
  "item1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first item purchased */,
  "item2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second item purchased */,
  "item3_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third item purchased */,
  "item4_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fourth item purchased */,
  "item5_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fifth item purchased */,
  "item6_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sixth item purchased */,
  "item1_timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the first item was purchased */,
  "item2_timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the second item was purchased */,
  "item3_timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the third item was purchased */,
  "item4_timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the fourth item was purchased */,
  "item5_timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the fifth item was purchased */,
  "item6_timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp when the sixth item was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_items_item3_id FOREIGN KEY ("item3_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_items_item6_id FOREIGN KEY ("item6_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_items_item5_id FOREIGN KEY ("item5_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_items_item1_id FOREIGN KEY ("item1_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_items_item2_id FOREIGN KEY ("item2_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_items_item4_id FOREIGN KEY ("item4_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lanes" (
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lane */,
  "lane_name" TEXT /* Name of the lane (e.g., top, mid, bot) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the lane (e.g., solo, carry, support, jungle) */,
  "lane_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the lane's image */,
  "lane_description" TEXT /* Description of the lane (e.g., 'Top lane is often played by tanky champions.') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lane_id")
)
